{{CargoOrgan
|name=Adrenal Glands of Gaia
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10887
|idx=98
|description=Earth's Will was dismembered by Demon Gods. Some organs were retrieved and given as Reconstruction Feast rewards.
|skill=
|hp=2270
|def=245
|atk=328
|rush=270
|gene1=Fire DMG +120
|gene2=CRIT +10%
|gene3=Crit DMG +10%
|gene4=Fire RES +120
|gene5=CRIT +10%
|gene6=Crit DMG +10%
|gene7=Fire DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
